metadata.name: kirite
metadata.description: KIRITE Privacy Protocol — Confidential transfers, shield pools, and stealth addresses on Solana

instructions.name: accept_authority_transfer
docs: Accept a pending authority transfer.

instructions.name: add_supported_mint
docs: Add a token mint to the supported mints list.

instructions.name: apply_pending_balance
docs: Apply pending incoming transfers to the main encrypted balance.
Recipients must periodically apply their pending balance to keep
their account in sync. This is a separate instruction to allow
the recipient to decrypt and verify pending amounts off-chain
before applying.

instructions.name: burn_fees
docs: Burn accumulated protocol fees.

accounts.name: fee_token_account
docs: The token account holding accumulated fees to burn.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The mint of the token being burned.

accounts.name: fee_authority
docs: Fee account authority PDA.

instructions.name: cancel_fee_proposal
docs: Cancel a pending fee proposal.

instructions.name: claim_stealth_address
docs: Claim a stealth address by proving ownership of the spend key.
The recipient provides a spend proof (signature using the derived
stealth private key) to claim the funds associated with the
stealth address.

accounts.name: recipient
docs: The recipient who can prove ownership of the stealth address.
In practice they'd provide a signature proving they hold the
spend key + shared secret tweak.

instructions.name: confidential_transfer
docs: Execute a confidential transfer between two accounts.
The sender provides:
- Ciphertext of the amount under their own key (for balance update)
- Ciphertext of the amount under the recipient's key
- A range proof (amount >= 0 and sender balance stays non-negative)
- An equality proof (both ciphertexts encrypt the same value)
No plaintext amounts are ever revealed on-chain.

instructions.name: create_confidential_account
docs: Create a confidential token account with an ElGamal public key.
The account stores an encrypted balance that can only be decrypted
by the owner. Transfers between confidential accounts update the
ciphertexts homomorphically without revealing amounts on-chain.

instructions.name: deactivate_stealth_registry
docs: Deactivate a stealth registry. No new stealth addresses can be
derived after deactivation, but existing addresses remain valid.

instructions.name: deposit
docs: Deposit tokens into a shield pool.
The depositor transfers exactly `denomination` tokens into the pool
vault and provides a commitment hash that is inserted into the
on-chain Merkle tree. The commitment binds a secret nullifier and
blinding factor so that only the holder of these secrets can
withdraw later.
The deposit is timelocked — it cannot be withdrawn until
`timelock_seconds` have elapsed.

accounts.name: pool_entry
docs: Pool entry PDA seeded by pre-computed commitment hash.

instructions.name: execute_fee_update
docs: Execute a fee update after the timelock has elapsed.

instructions.name: freeze_pool
docs: Freeze a shield pool (prevent deposits and withdrawals).

instructions.name: initialize_protocol
docs: Initialize the KIRITE privacy protocol.
Sets the protocol authority, fee parameters, and creates the
governance state account. Must be called exactly once.
# Arguments
* `fee_bps` — Protocol fee in basis points (e.g., 10 = 0.1%)
* `burn_ratio_bps` — Fraction of fees to burn (e.g., 5000 = 50%)

accounts.name: treasury
docs: The treasury account that will receive protocol fees.

instructions.name: initialize_shield_pool
docs: Create a new shield pool for a specific token denomination.
Each pool accepts deposits of exactly one fixed denomination to
maximise the anonymity set. Multiple pools can exist for the same
token with different denominations.

accounts.name: vault
docs: The token vault owned by the pool's vault authority PDA.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The token mint for this pool.

instructions.name: initiate_authority_transfer
docs: Initiate a two-step authority transfer.

instructions.name: pause_protocol
docs: Pause all protocol operations. Emergency use only.

instructions.name: propose_fee_update
docs: Propose a fee update. Subject to timelock before execution.

instructions.name: register_stealth_registry
docs: Register a stealth meta-address (spend_pubkey, view_pubkey).
This is published once per user. Senders look up the recipient's
registry and derive a one-time stealth address for each payment.
The recipient scans ephemeral key announcements using their view
key to detect incoming payments.

instructions.name: remove_supported_mint
docs: Remove a token mint from the supported mints list.

instructions.name: resolve_stealth_address
docs: Derive a one-time stealth address for a recipient.
The sender generates an ephemeral keypair and uses the recipient's
view pubkey to create a shared secret. The stealth address is
derived by combining the shared secret with the recipient's spend
pubkey. An ephemeral key announcement is published on-chain so
the recipient can scan for it.

instructions.name: resume_protocol
docs: Resume protocol operations after a pause.

instructions.name: unfreeze_pool
docs: Unfreeze a previously frozen shield pool.

instructions.name: update_governance_signers
docs: Update governance signer set and threshold.

instructions.name: withdraw
docs: Withdraw tokens from a shield pool to any recipient.
The withdrawer proves knowledge of the nullifier secret and provides
a Merkle inclusion proof. The nullifier hash is published on-chain
to prevent double-spending. The link between depositor and
recipient is broken because:
1. The commitment hides the nullifier and blinding factor.
2. The nullifier hash reveals nothing about the depositor.
3. The recipient can be any address.
4. A relayer submits the transaction so the recipient pays no gas.

accounts.name: pool_entry
docs: The deposit entry for verification.

accounts.name: vault
docs: The pool's token vault.

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA that signs token transfers out of the vault.

accounts.name: recipient_token_account
docs: Recipient's token account — can be anyone, breaking the link
between depositor and recipient.

accounts.name: treasury_token_account
docs: Treasury token account for fee collection.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The token mint (needed for burn CPI).

accounts.name: relayer
docs: The withdrawer who submits the proof (pays gas, receives nothing).
This is intentionally separated from the recipient for privacy.

errors.name: UnauthorizedAuthority
errors.msg: Caller is not the protocol authority

errors.name: UnauthorizedOperator
errors.msg: Caller is not the pool operator

errors.name: GovernanceQuorumNotMet
errors.msg: Governance action requires quorum approval

errors.name: GovernanceTimelockActive
errors.msg: Timelock period has not elapsed for this governance action

errors.name: ProtocolPaused
errors.msg: Protocol is currently paused

errors.name: UnsupportedMint
errors.msg: This token mint is not supported by the protocol

errors.name: PoolCapacityExceeded
errors.msg: Shield pool has reached maximum capacity

errors.name: PoolNotActive
errors.msg: Shield pool is not yet active

errors.name: PoolFrozen
errors.msg: Shield pool has been permanently frozen

errors.name: DepositBelowMinimum
errors.msg: Deposit amount is below the pool minimum

errors.name: DepositAboveMaximum
errors.msg: Deposit amount exceeds the pool maximum

errors.name: DepositTimelocked
errors.msg: Deposit is still within the timelock period

errors.name: DepositNotFound
errors.msg: Deposit entry not found in the pool

errors.name: DepositAlreadyWithdrawn
errors.msg: Deposit has already been withdrawn

errors.name: NullifierAlreadyUsed
errors.msg: Nullifier has already been consumed

errors.name: InvalidMerkleProof
errors.msg: Provided Merkle proof is invalid

errors.name: DenominationMismatch
errors.msg: Pool denomination does not match the provided amount

errors.name: InvalidAmountProof
errors.msg: Encrypted amount proof verification failed

errors.name: RangeProofFailed
errors.msg: Range proof verification failed — amount may be negative or overflow

errors.name: MalformedCiphertext
errors.msg: Ciphertext is malformed or uses an unsupported encoding

errors.name: InsufficientEncryptedBalance
errors.msg: Sender has insufficient encrypted balance

errors.name: DecryptionKeyMismatch
errors.msg: Decryption key does not match the account's public key

errors.name: InvalidElGamalKey
errors.msg: ElGamal public key is not on the curve

errors.name: StealthAddressAlreadyRegistered
errors.msg: Stealth address has already been registered

errors.name: StealthRegistryFull
errors.msg: Stealth registry is full

errors.name: InvalidEphemeralKey
errors.msg: Ephemeral public key is invalid

errors.name: StealthDerivationMismatch
errors.msg: Stealth address derivation does not match the expected output

errors.name: InvalidScanKey
errors.msg: Scan key does not correspond to the registered stealth meta-address

errors.name: InvalidSpendKey
errors.msg: Spend key verification failed

errors.name: FeeOverflow
errors.msg: Fee calculation resulted in overflow

errors.name: FeeBasisPointsExceedMax
errors.msg: Fee basis points exceed maximum allowed (10000)

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow in calculation

errors.name: DivisionByZero
errors.msg: Division by zero in calculation

errors.name: InputTooLong
errors.msg: Input data exceeds maximum allowed length

errors.name: InvalidAccountSize
errors.msg: Account data length does not match expected size

errors.name: InvalidBump
errors.msg: Provided bump seed does not match the derived bump

errors.name: InvalidTimestamp
errors.msg: Timestamp is in the future or unreasonable

errors.name: NonceReused
errors.msg: Nonce has already been used

errors.name: InvalidVariant
errors.msg: Instruction data contains invalid enum variant

types.name: ConfidentialAccount
docs: A confidential token account that stores an ElGamal-encrypted balance.
PDA seeded by `["confidential_account", owner, mint]`.

fields.name: owner
docs: Owner of this confidential account.

fields.name: mint
docs: Token mint.

fields.name: elgamal_pubkey
docs: ElGamal public key for encrypting amounts to this account.

fields.name: encrypted_balance
docs: Current encrypted balance (ElGamal ciphertext).
Updated homomorphically: new_balance = old_balance ⊕ delta_ciphertext.

fields.name: pending_balance
docs: Pending incoming balance (accumulated between decrypt cycles).

fields.name: pending_count
docs: Number of pending transfers not yet applied.

fields.name: max_pending
docs: Maximum allowed pending transfers before forced apply.

fields.name: is_frozen
docs: Whether the account is frozen by the protocol.

fields.name: nonce
docs: Nonce to prevent replay of apply-pending instructions.

fields.name: last_activity
docs: Timestamp of last activity.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed.

types.name: ConfidentialTransferParams
docs: Parameters for a confidential transfer.

fields.name: sender_ciphertext
docs: Ciphertext of the transfer amount under the SENDER's ElGamal key.
Used to update (subtract from) sender's encrypted balance.

fields.name: recipient_ciphertext
docs: Ciphertext of the transfer amount under the RECIPIENT's ElGamal key.
Used to update (add to) recipient's pending balance.

fields.name: fee_ciphertext
docs: Ciphertext of the fee amount under the protocol's ElGamal key.

fields.name: range_proof
docs: Range proof that the amount is in [0, 2^64) and that the sender's
balance after subtraction is non-negative.

fields.name: equality_proof
docs: Equality proof that sender_ciphertext and recipient_ciphertext
encrypt the same plaintext amount (under different keys).

types.name: CreateStealthParams
docs: Parameters for creating a new stealth address.

types.name: DepositParams
docs: Parameters for depositing into a shield pool.

fields.name: commitment
docs: Pre-computed commitment hash (verified on-chain).

types.name: EphemeralKeyRecord
docs: Ephemeral key announcement stored on-chain so recipients can scan
for payments addressed to them. This is the "announcement log" pattern
similar to Ethereum stealth address ERC-5564.
PDA seeded by `["ephemeral_key", stealth_address]`.

fields.name: stealth_address
docs: The stealth address this ephemeral key resolves to.

fields.name: registry
docs: The registry (meta-address) of the intended recipient.

fields.name: ephemeral_pubkey
docs: The ephemeral public key R = r*G.

fields.name: view_tag
docs: A view tag — first byte of the shared secret — used for fast
scanning. Recipients compute `H(view_key * R)[0]` and compare
to this tag; non-matching entries are skipped cheaply.

fields.name: created_at
docs: Timestamp.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed.

types.name: FeeProposal
docs: Fee configuration snapshot, used in governance proposals to stage
fee changes before they take effect (timelock).

fields.name: proposer
docs: Who proposed this fee change.

fields.name: new_fee_bps
docs: New fee in basis points.

fields.name: new_burn_ratio_bps
docs: New burn ratio in basis points.

fields.name: proposed_at
docs: Timestamp when the proposal was created.

fields.name: executable_at
docs: Timestamp when the proposal becomes executable.

fields.name: executed
docs: Whether this proposal has been executed.

fields.name: cancelled
docs: Whether this proposal has been cancelled.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed.

types.name: GovernanceState
docs: Governance state tracking for multi-sig or DAO-controlled upgrades.

fields.name: version
docs: Current governance model version.

fields.name: required_signers
docs: Number of required signers for governance actions.

fields.name: signers
docs: List of authorised governance signers (up to 7).

fields.name: total_proposals
docs: Total proposals created.

fields.name: total_executed
docs: Total proposals executed.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed.

types.name: NullifierSet
docs: Nullifier set — regular account.

types.name: PoolConfig
docs: Pool configuration parameters for pool creation.

types.name: PoolEntry
docs: Deposit entry — regular account (small enough for stack).

types.name: ProtocolConfig
docs: Global protocol configuration. Singleton PDA seeded by `["protocol_config"]`.

fields.name: authority
docs: The admin / upgrade authority for the protocol.

fields.name: pending_authority
docs: Optional pending authority for two-step transfer.

fields.name: fee_bps
docs: Protocol fee in basis points (e.g., 10 = 0.1%).

fields.name: burn_ratio_bps
docs: What fraction of collected fees are burned (in bps, e.g., 5000 = 50%).

fields.name: treasury
docs: Treasury wallet that receives the non-burned portion of fees.

fields.name: is_paused
docs: Whether the entire protocol is paused (emergency kill-switch).

fields.name: supported_mints
docs: List of token mints the protocol supports for shield pools and
confidential transfers. Up to 32 mints.

fields.name: total_pools
docs: Total number of shield pools created.

fields.name: total_deposits
docs: Total deposits across all pools (denominated in base units, summed).

fields.name: total_withdrawals
docs: Total withdrawals across all pools.

fields.name: total_fees_collected
docs: Total fees collected (before burn split).

fields.name: total_fees_burned
docs: Total fees burned.

fields.name: initialized_slot
docs: Slot at which the protocol was initialised.

fields.name: initialized_at
docs: Timestamp at which the protocol was initialised.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA derivation.

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Reserved space for future upgrades without realloc.

types.name: ResolveStealthParams
docs: Parameters for resolving (deriving) a stealth address for a recipient.

types.name: ShieldPool
docs: Shield pool — zero_copy to avoid stack overflow on deserialization.

types.name: StealthAddress
docs: A resolved stealth address record. Created when a sender derives a
one-time address for a recipient.
PDA seeded by `["stealth_address", registry, ephemeral_pubkey]`.

fields.name: registry
docs: The registry this stealth address was derived from.

fields.name: address
docs: The one-time Solana address (derived deterministically).

fields.name: ephemeral_pubkey
docs: The ephemeral public key the sender published so the recipient
can scan and detect this payment.

fields.name: mint
docs: The token mint for this stealth payment (Pubkey::default for SOL).

fields.name: encrypted_amount
docs: Encrypted amount (ElGamal ciphertext under recipient's view key).

fields.name: is_claimed
docs: Whether the recipient has claimed / swept this stealth address.

fields.name: created_at
docs: Timestamp of creation.

fields.name: claimed_at
docs: Timestamp when claimed (0 if unclaimed).

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed.

types.name: StealthRegistry
docs: A stealth meta-address registry for a user.
Each user publishes their (spend_pubkey, view_pubkey) so that senders
can derive one-time stealth addresses without interaction.
PDA seeded by `["stealth_registry", owner]`.

fields.name: owner
docs: The wallet that owns this registry.

fields.name: spend_pubkey
docs: The public spend key (compressed Curve25519 point).
Used in the final stealth address derivation.

fields.name: view_pubkey
docs: The public view key (compressed Curve25519 point).
Senders use this to create the shared secret.

fields.name: address_count
docs: Number of stealth addresses derived for this registry.

fields.name: is_active
docs: Whether this registry is active. Can be deactivated by owner.

fields.name: created_at
docs: Timestamp of creation.

fields.name: last_used_at
docs: Last time a stealth address was derived using this registry.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed.

types.name: WithdrawParams
docs: Parameters for withdrawing from a shield pool.

fields.name: nullifier_secret
docs: The nullifier secret (reveals the deposit without linking to depositor).

fields.name: blinding_factor
docs: Blinding factor used in the original commitment.

fields.name: leaf_index
docs: Leaf index of the deposit in the Merkle tree.

fields.name: merkle_proof
docs: Merkle proof — path from leaf to root (20 sibling hashes).

fields.name: proof_root
docs: The Merkle root the proof was computed against.
Must be a known root (current or recent historical).

fields.name: range_proof
docs: Range proof that the withdrawal amount is valid.
